rulings.Case Title: CHARLES PALK et al VS. DAVID RUBINSTEIN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Mtion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint;
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 30, 2013, line 2. PLAINTIFF CHARLES PALK and JENNIFER PALK-COGLEY's Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is denied as to paragraphs 23, 3134, 3 as outlines in Defendants' opposition. Plaintiffs' failed to avail themselves of an opportunity to make these amendments pursuant to this Court's January 30, 2013. = (501/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: NOLAN LEE VS. MICK LEE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 30, 2013, line 13. DEFENDANT MICK LEE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Demurrer improperly raises an issue of fact, i.e. itemization of alleged past due charges. = (501/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN SOLLNER et al VS. ANDREW LINTON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 30, 2013, line 10. DEFENDANT MARIANA CERVELLEIRA'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Even though First Amended Complaint cannot support a cause of action under CCP 1160(2) - no leave to file a supplemental complaint was requested or granted, it alleges unlawful detainer under CCP 1160(1). Points and Authorities do not support a demurrer to the first cause of action for forcible entry

rulings.Case Title: FRANK ANNICELLI VS. ROBERT PRADO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn & Mtn In Support Of Mtn To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment And Proposed Response
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 30, 2013, line 12. DEFENDANT ROBERT PRADO'S Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment And Proposed Response DENIED. Defendant failed to carry his burden under CCP 473(b) and show mistake, inadvertence or excusable neglect. = (501/EHG)
